creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #18)

Aren't the config.m4-patches you removed needed when restoring the option to use the bundled pcre?

E.g. https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/diff/mail/php83-imap/files/patch-config.m4?id=8667a82724a9c7d2560c438d98f23990d08a08eb
